Range rules: Always ensure the node indices are within the document range to avoid null reference exceptions.
Loading rules: Instantiate LoadOptions with the default constructor and set the Password property instead of using a non‑existent constructor overload.
Load WORDML using LoadOptions with LoadFormat.WordML.
Add the required using directive for Aspose.Words.Loading (for LoadOptions).
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Remove references to the Shape class when working with plain‑text (TXT) documents, because Shape belongs to Aspose.Words.Drawing and is not applicable here.
If you need to keep Shape handling for other document types, add `using Aspose.Words.Drawing;` and keep the Shape check, but for TXT examples the simpler check (Paragraph || Run) is sufficient.
Watermark rules: Remove any incorrect `using` directive that references the `Watermark` type; it is not a namespace.
Use the `Document.Watermark` property to access watermark functionality.
Pass both the watermark text and a `TextWatermarkOptions` instance to `SetText` for custom formatting.
